For hole-doped carriers near the moire superlattice, the three superconducting phases exhibit distinctively different in plane magnetic field responses: one is weakly enhanced, the second is strongly suppressed, and the third exclusively induced by in plane magnetic field. The isotropic in plane magnetic field response in the QAH regime points to interplay between orbital magnetism and spin-orbit coupling, and the field-emergent superconductivity provides compelling evidence for spin-triplet pairing. Our work demonstrates a highly versatile platform for coexisting topological and superconducting states, and highlights in plane magnetic field as a powerful in-situ control knob for engineering novel quantum devices.

AI.tldr: 八层菱方石墨烯/hBN莫尔超晶格同时实现了量子反常霍尔（QAH）态和三种非常规超导相，其中一种超导相可由面内磁场诱导产生，为自旋三重态配对提供了有力证据。
AI.motivation: 探索菱方石墨烯莫尔超晶格这一拓扑平带平台中是否能够实现丰富的拓扑与超导共存量子相，并研究面内磁场作为调控手段的潜力。
AI.method: 构建hBN对准的八层菱方石墨烯莫尔超晶格器件，通过调节位移场、面内磁场及载流子掺杂浓度，测量输运性质来观测QAH态和超导相。
AI.result: 发现：(1) 电子掺杂侧QAH陈数可被位移场和面内磁场反转；(2) 空穴掺杂侧存在三种超导相，对面内磁场响应分别为弱增强、强抑制和仅由面内磁场诱导；(3) QAH区面内磁场响应为各向同性。
AI.conclusion: 八层菱方石墨烯是一个高度通用的拓扑与超导共存平台，面内磁场可作为一种原位调控旋钮用于设计新型量子器件。

title: Local probing of superconductivity at oxide interfaces with atomic force microscopy
summary: Superconductivity in strontium titanate has remained enigmatic for more than 50 years. The LaAlO$_3$/SrTiO$_3$ (LAO/STO) heterointerface enables systematic dimensional confinement, from a two-dimensional electron gas to quasi-one-dimensional nanostructures, providing access to this quantum state. Transport measurements in patterned devices reveal puzzling phenomena, including width-independent critical currents and anomalous pairing suggestive of one-dimensional behavior, but direct local probes of the patterned interface and its superconducting response have been lacking. Here we use ultralow-temperature non-contact atomic force microscopy, dissipation spectroscopy, and Kelvin probe force microscopy to locally probe signatures of superconductivity in patterned LAO/STO devices. Spatially resolved energy-dissipation measurements reveal superconducting signatures, with features confined in some devices to edge channels approximately 200 nm wide. Dissipation spectra exhibit a characteristic nonlinear bias dependence that provides a local diagnostic of superconductivity, consistent with the intermediate carrier-density regime near the superconducting dome, and persisting up to the critical field. These results establish atomic force microscopy as a local probe of superconductivity in patterned LAO/STO structures and provide a route to addressing longstanding questions about quantum confinement and transport anomalies in correlated oxide nanostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文利用超低温非接触原子力显微镜、耗散谱学和开尔文探针力显微镜，在图案化的LAO/STO异质界面器件中局部探测超导电性，发现超导信号局限于约200 nm宽的边缘通道，并建立了原子力显微镜作为局域超导探针的方法。
AI.motivation: 钛酸锶（SrTiO₃）中的超导电性已困扰学界50余年，LAO/STO异质界面虽然能实现维度约化（从二维电子气到准一维纳米结构），但缺乏局域探测手段来直接观测图案化界面的超导响应，尤其是理解宽度无关的临界电流和异常配对等谜团。
AI.method: 采用超低温非接触原子力显微镜（nc-AFM）、耗散谱学（dissipation spectroscopy）和开尔文探针力显微镜（KPFM），在图案化的LAO/STO器件上开展局域空间分辨的测量。
AI.result: 空间分辨的能耗测量显示出超导特征，在某些器件中这些特征局限于约200 nm宽的边缘通道；耗散谱呈现特征性的非线性偏压依赖关系，可作为超导电性的局域诊断手段；该信号出现在超导穹顶附近的中间载流子密度区域，并持续至临界磁场。
AI.conclusion: 本研究确立了原子力显微镜作为图案化LAO/STO结构中局域超导探针的有效性，为解答关联氧化物纳米结构中量子限域和输运异常的长期问题提供了可行的技术途径。

title: Fragment-Constrained Charge Equilibration for Charge-Aware Machine Learning Potentials at Electrochemical Interfaces
summary: Predictive simulation of electrochemical interfaces requires atomistic models that capture reactive bond rearrangements, long-range electrostatics, and charge distributions reflecting the electronic distinctness of electrode and electrolyte. Existing charge-aware machine-learned interatomic potentials (MLIPs) built on global charge equilibration (QEq) settle electrode and electrolyte at a common electrochemical potential, leaving no room for the interfacial gradient that the double layer requires and admitting spurious charge transfer between electronically disconnected regions. Per-fragment charge equilibration is the established remedy in classical molecular dynamics, but reliance on predefined molecular topology has confined it to non-reactive systems. We lift this restriction by making fragment identification itself a differentiable function of atomic geometry, yielding soft fragment-constrained charge equilibration (Soft-FQEq) -- a solver layer that restores fragment-resolved charge conservation in reactive MLIPs. The layer consumes four scalar MLP readouts from a shared atomic-feature network -- per-atom electronegativity, source charge, short-range energy, and a soft bond connectivity -- and returns equilibrated charges together with per-fragment chemical potentials. We implement Soft-FQEq as an extension of the hippynn framework on a HIP-NN feature network and train it on DFT energies, forces, and DDEC6 charges for IrO2/H2O/Na+/ClO4- interfaces. The trained model recovers a clear electrode-to-electrolyte gradient in the per-atom electrochemical potential. With the same trained weights but the fragment-constrained solver replaced by global QEq at inference, this gradient collapses to an essentially uniform profile, directly showing that the gradient cannot be sustained within global QEq while the fragment formulation recovers it.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Soft-FQEq方法，通过可微分的软片段约束取代传统硬拓扑划分，在反应性体系中将片段级别的电荷守恒约束整合到机器学习原子间势中，从而恢复电极/电解液界面的电化学势梯度，解决了全局QEq方法无法维持双电层界面梯度的根本问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的全局电荷平衡(QEq)方法将电极和电解液置于相同的电化学势，无法产生双电层所需的界面梯度，且允许电子失连区域间产生虚假电荷转移。传统片段电荷平衡虽能解决此问题，但依赖预定义分子拓扑，仅限于非反应性体系。
AI.method: 提出Soft-FQEq方法：将片段识别本身构建为原子几何的可微函数，取代传统硬拓扑划分。该求解器层从共享原子特征网络中读取4个标量(电负性、源电荷、短程能量、软键连接性)，输出平衡电荷和每片段化学势，实现了反应性MLIP中的片段级电荷守恒。
AI.result: 在IrO2/H2O/Na+/ClO4-界面上的DFT训练结果表明，模型恢复了清晰的电极到电解液的电化学势梯度；而将相同权重下用全局QEq替换片段约束求解器后，梯度消失为均匀分布，直接证明全局QEq无法维持该梯度而片段公式可以。
AI.conclusion: Soft-FQEq成功将片段约束电荷平衡推广至反应性体系，为电化学界面的预测性模拟提供了能够同时处理反应性键重排、长程静电和界面电荷梯度的原子级建模工具。

title: Domain-wall melting in all-to-all QSSEP from random-matrix theory
summary: We study the melting of a domain wall in the quantum simple exclusion process with all-to-all hoppings (a.k.a. the charged SYK$_2$ model). We show that the real-time dynamics of physical quantities of interest can be obtained exploiting spectral results in random matrix theory. We first show that the eigenvalues of the correlation matrix corresponding to the initially charged subsystem evolve according to a Jacobi process, which is defined in terms of a closed system of stochastic differential equations. In turn, this observation allows us to obtain the real-time dynamics of all the eigenvalue moments. We present two physical applications. First, we study the dynamics of the averaged von Neumann entanglement entropy, arriving at a fully explicit expression in the thermodynamic limit. Second, we compute analytically the full-counting statistics of the charge. Our formula allows us to perform a thorough comparison with the full-counting statistics of the classical simple exclusion process. Notably, we show that, in the thermodynamic limit, the quantum and classical full-counting statistics coincide, with no finite-time corrections.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了全连接量子简单排斥过程（带电SYK₂模型）中畴壁的熔化现象，利用随机矩阵理论谱结果推导出实时间动力学，并在热力学极限下给出了冯·诺依曼纠缠熵的显式表达式以及全计数统计的解析结果。有趣的是，经典和量子全计数统计在热力学极限下精确一致。
AI.motivation: 理解量子排斥过程中畴壁熔化的实时动力学，并建立量子与经典简单排斥过程全计数统计之间的关系。
AI.method: 利用随机矩阵理论中的谱结果，证明关联矩阵特征值遵循Jacobi过程（由封闭随机微分方程组定义），进而得到所有特征值矩的实时动力学。
AI.result: 在热力学极限下，得到了平均冯·诺依曼纠缠熵的完全显式表达式；解析计算了全计数统计，并证明量子与经典简单排斥过程的全计数统计在热力学极限下完全一致，无有限时间修正。
AI.conclusion: 量子与经典简单排斥过程的全计数统计在热力学极限下精确相同，揭示了二者之间深刻的普适性联系。

title: Ultrafast Sliding Ferroelectric Switching in Bilayer Hexagonal Boron Nitride Revealed by Deep Learning Molecular Dynamics
comment: 26 pages, 4 figures, 14 pages of Supporting information
summary: Sliding ferroelectricity in bilayer hexagonal boron nitride (h-BN) offers compelling prospects for next-generation non-volatile memory, yet the atomistic dynamics of electric-field-driven polarization switching remain poorly understood. Here, we present a fully data-driven, coupled atomistic framework that integrates a fine-tuned MACE machine learning potential (MLP) with an equivariant graph convolutional neural network (EGCNN) for real-time Born effective charge (BEC) prediction, enabling large-scale non-equilibrium molecular dynamics simulations of AB-stacked bilayer h-BN under applied electric fields. By implementing a rigorous real-space path-integral polarization formalism combined with a state-constrained Gaussian convolution background extraction procedure, we successfully isolate the intrinsic spontaneous polarization from the dominant dielectric background. Our simulations reveal that coherent single-domain rigid sliding, completing within 5 ps, constitutes a physically viable ultrafast switching mechanism, and reproduces clean ferroelectric hysteresis loops whose shape is qualitatively consistent with experimental observations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过集成MACE机器学习势和等变图卷积神经网络，构建了数据驱动的原子级框架，实现了对AB堆叠双层六方氮化硼在电场下极化翻转的大规模非平衡分子动力学模拟。研究发现，5皮秒内完成的连贯单域刚性滑动是一种可行的超快翻转机制，并再现了与实验定性一致的铁电滞后回线。
AI.motivation: 双层六方氮化硼中的滑动铁电性为下一代非易失性存储器提供了前景，但电场驱动的极化翻转的原子级动力学机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 1) 集成微调后的MACE机器学习势与等变图卷积神经网络用于实时Born有效电荷预测；2) 采用实空间路径积分极化形式与状态约束高斯卷积背景提取程序，从介电背景中分离本征自发极化。
AI.result: 发现连贯单域刚性滑动可在5皮秒内完成，是一种可行的超快翻转机制；成功再现了与实验定性一致的干净铁电滞后回线。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解h-BN滑动铁电性的超快开关动力学提供了原子级视角，验证了数据驱动方法在复杂铁电材料模拟中的有效性。

title: Theory of quantum decoherence in macroscopic topological insulators
summary: Quantum decoherence-the loss of quantum coherence due to interactions with an environment-plays a central role in quantum transport, and controlling this ubiquitous yet inevitable phenomenon is essential for practical quantum technologies. Despite its importance, the microscopic mechanisms of decoherence in infinite-size topological insulators remain poorly understood. Here, we develop a comprehensive theory that quantitatively investigates how quantum decoherence shapes the quantum spin Hall effect in macroscopic topological insulators, and reveal that decoherence-induced corrections scale quadratically with impurity density. Besides, we uncover a previously unidentified mechanism of the extrinsic spin Hall effect: a second-order skew-scattering process intrinsically tied to quantum decoherence-fundamentally distinct from, yet substantially stronger than, the conventional third-order skew-scattering mechanism. Furthermore, we predict a new scaling law in which the decoherence-induced spin Hall conductivity scales quadratically with the longitudinal conductivity, providing a clear experimental signature of decoherence effects. Our results establish the essential role of decoherence in quantum transport of topological insulators and reveal that macroscopic topological insulators offer a promising platform for next-generation spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了宏观拓扑绝缘体中量子退相干影响量子自旋霍尔效应的完整理论，揭示了退相干修正与杂质密度的二次方关系，发现了一种源自退相干的二阶外禀自旋霍尔效应（优于传统三阶机制），并预测了自旋霍尔电导率与纵向电导率的二次方标度律。
AI.motivation: 尽管退相干在量子输运中至关重要，但无限大拓扑绝缘体中退相干的微观机制尚不清楚，控制退相干对量子技术至关重要。
AI.method: 开发了一套完整理论，定量研究了量子退相干如何影响宏观拓扑绝缘体中的量子自旋霍尔效应。
AI.result: (1) 退相干修正与杂质密度呈二次方关系；(2) 发现一种源自退相干的二阶外禀自旋霍尔效应（第二类斜散射机制），比传统三阶机制更强；(3) 预测退相干诱导的自旋霍尔电导率与纵向电导率呈二次方标度律。
AI.conclusion: 退相干在拓扑绝缘体量子输运中扮演关键角色，宏观拓扑绝缘体为下一代自旋电子学应用提供了有前景的平台。

title: Magnetic excitation spectrum and hierarchy of magnetic interactions in ErFeO3
summary: We report a comprehensive investigation of the excitation spectrum of ErFeO$_3$ orthoferrite by means of time-of-flight neutron spectroscopy. The spectrum consists of two distinct components: strongly dispersive spin wave excitations of the Fe$^{3+}$ sublattice spanning $\approx$~9 - 65 meV, and crystal electric field (CEF) excitations of Er$^{3+}$ ions below 36 meV. The observed spin wave dispersions and spectral weight are well captured within linear spin wave theory, enabling extraction of the key Fe-Fe exchange parameters. Low-energy incident neutrons with their enhanced energy resolution, further revealed the dispersive character and splitting of Kramers-degenerate CEF levels. We show that the dispersion is caused by the exchange coupling between Er$^{3+}$ ions, while the degeneracy is lifted by interactions between the Er$^{3+}$ and Fe$^{3+}$ sublattices. We further explore the influence of dipolar and antisymmetric exchange interactions with the focus on the magnetic ground state of ErFeO$_3$, with particular attention to the low-temperature spin arrangement. Taken together, our results provide a detailed account of the spin dynamics in ErFeO$_3$ and reveal a hierarchy of interactions scales characteristic for orthoferrites.

AI.tldr: 本工作利用飞行时间中子散射技术系统研究了ErFeO₃正交铁氧体的激发谱，揭示了Fe³⁺子晶格的高能自旋波激发（~9-65 meV）和Er³⁺离子的晶场激发（<36 meV），并通过线性自旋波理论提取了关键交换参数。研究还发现了Er³⁺能级的色散和克莱默简并劈裂，分别归因于Er-Er交换耦合和Er-Fe子晶格间相互作用，并探讨了偶极和反对称交换对磁基态的影响。
AI.motivation: 深入理解ErFeO₃正交铁氧体中复杂的自旋动力学和多尺度相互作用层次，特别是Er³⁺与Fe³⁺子晶格之间的耦合机制及其对磁基态的影响。
AI.method: 采用飞行时间中子非弹性散射谱（时间-of-flight neutron spectroscopy），结合线性自旋波理论（linear spin wave theory）对实验数据进行拟合与分析，同时利用低能入射中子提高能量分辨率以观测精细能级结构。
AI.result: 成功观测到Fe³⁺子晶格的自旋波激发（~9-65 meV）和Er³⁺的晶场激发（<36 meV）；发现Er³⁺的晶场能级具有色散性（源于Er-Er交换耦合）且克莱默简并被劈裂（源于Er-Fe子晶格相互作用）；通过线性自旋波理论精确提取了Fe-Fe交换参数。
AI.conclusion: 该研究全面揭示了ErFeO₃中的自旋动力学，阐明了正交铁氧体中特征性的相互作用层级结构，为理解此类材料的磁性能提供了重要实验依据。

title: Enhancement of superconducting stiffness in hybrid superconducting-metallic bilayers
summary:
Boosting superconductivity by metallic reservoirs is the essence of Kivelson's bilayer proposal.
  One layer provides pairing to the electrons, while the weakly coupled metal provides additional phase coherence to those pairs by mediating extended-range pair-pair coupling.
  Demonstrating significant and unambiguous performance gains with strong-coupling methods for such set-ups had been difficult.
  In the present work, we study these systems doped away from half-filling, corresponding to a partially spin-polarized 1D Anderson- or Kondo-lattice.
  We show that this breaks the coexistence of dominant superconducting and density-density correlations decisively in favour or the former.
  Consequently, we provide evidence that in this doped regime, superconducting near-long-range order is not precluded by a small charge-gap in the thermodynamic limit, as we have recently shown to be the case at half-filling [JE Ebot $et$ $al.$, arXiv:2602.11153 [cond-mat.supr-con]].
  We study the complex manner in which the enhancement of superconductivity in the pairing layer depends on the parameters of the metal, and especially that both pairing-limited and stiffness-limited regimes may appear in these systems.
  In addition to superconducting bilayers, our results are relevant, via a particle-hole transformation, for heavy-fermion Kondo-lattice materials in magnetic fields, as we provide previously lacking insight on the competition between antiferromagnetic and easy-plane magnetism, as well as a route for comprehensive indirect tests of Kivelson's bilayer proposal well beyond previous capabilities.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过金属储层超导增强的Kivelson双层模型，发现掺杂偏离半填充可打破超导与密度-密度关联共存，显著偏向超导态，并揭示了配对限制与刚度限制两种增强机制，同时通过粒子-空穴变换为重费米子Kondo晶格材料在磁场中的行为提供了新见解。
AI.motivation: Kivelson的双层提案认为金属储层可增强超导性，但此前使用强耦合方法的演示效果不佳且不明确。作者希望展示该体系在偏离半填充时的超导性能显著提升，并澄清关键竞争关系。
AI.method: 研究偏离半填充的部分自旋极化1D安德森或近藤晶格体系，使用强耦合方法分析超导与密度-密度关联的竞争，并探究超导增强对金属参数的复杂依赖关系。
AI.result: 掺杂使超导关联显著压倒密度-密度关联；在该掺杂区域，热力学极限下超导近长程序不被小的电荷能隙所阻碍；观察到了配对限制和刚度限制两种不同增强机制。
AI.conclusion: 证明了Kivelson双层提案在偏离半填充时表现优异，为超导增强提供了清晰证据，同时通过粒子-空穴变换为重费米子材料中的反铁磁与易平面磁性的竞争提供了新解释，并开辟了更全面的间接检验途径。

title: Compressibility of micromagnetic solutions in tensor train format
summary: For three-dimensional (3D) magnetic objects with linear size $L$ exceeding a few exchange lengths, the micromagnetic state exhibits pronounced informational sparsity: low-dimensional, high-gradient regions (e.g., domain walls) coexist with near-uniformly magnetized volumetric domains. Because standard micromagnetic simulation methods discretize the magnetization on near-uniform 3D grids with linear cell size $a$, they cannot take advantage of this sparsity. The computational problem scales as $\sim L^3$ and $\sim (1/a)^3$. In this Letter, we establish that direct tensor-train (TT) representations overcome these poor scalings by exploiting the spatial sparsity optimally, while preserving accuracy in a controlled way. Focusing on representative flux-closure configurations in soft-magnetic rectangular prisms, in the near-micrometer regime, we demonstrate that the parameter count of TT-compressed micromagnetic data scales approximately as $L^{1.8}$ and $(1/a)^{1.2}$. Hence the relative advantage over dense discretizations rapidly grows with the problem size and refinement level. These first results provide a strong motivation for future developments of micromagnetic solvers in TT format which could transcend the limitations of traditional simulators, with far reaching potential impacts on fundamental research and technology development.

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用张量列（TT）表示来高效压缩三维微磁学数据，利用其空间稀疏性，在保持精度的同时将计算复杂度从传统的O(L³)和O(1/a³)降低到约O(L¹·⁸)和O(1/a¹·²)，为突破传统微磁模拟器的规模限制提供了有力依据。
AI.motivation: 传统微磁模拟方法在均匀三维网格上离散化磁化强度，其计算量随线性尺寸L和网格精度a呈立方增长，无法利用微磁状态中固有的信息稀疏性（如低维高梯度区域与近均匀磁化区域共存），亟需一种能利用这种稀疏性的高效表示方法。
AI.method: 采用直接张量列（TT）表示对微磁数据进行压缩，以软磁矩形棱柱中代表性的磁通闭合构型为研究对象，在近微米尺度下分析其参数规模与问题尺寸L和网格精度a的缩放关系。
AI.result: TT压缩后的微磁数据参数规模近似为~L¹·⁸和~(1/a)¹·²，显著低于传统方法的立方缩放，且相对优势随问题规模和细化程度增大而迅速增长。
AI.conclusion: TT格式能够最优地利用微磁问题的空间稀疏性，为未来开发超越传统模拟器限制的微磁求解器提供了强有力的动机，对基础研究和技术开发具有深远潜力。

title: Radio Frequency Field-Induced Enhancement of Detection Sensitivity in Silicon Nanowire Sensors
summary: Sensitive biomarker detection in physiological fluids is often limited by Debye screening, which suppresses electrostatic signals at sensor surfaces. Here we report a sensing approach based on flexoelectric resonance in silicon nanowire field-effect transistors. An applied radiofrequency field induces strain gradients in the nanowires, generating flexoelectric polarization that is amplified at resonant frequencies. This effect enhances the sensitivity of conductance measurements to small surface charge variations associated with biomolecular binding. Using C-reactive protein as a model biomarker, we observe an order-of-magnitude improvement in detection sensitivity compared to conventional operation, with a 62% conductance increase versus 30% without radiofrequency modulation. The high-frequency field also perturbs the electrical double layer, reducing Debye screening in high-ionic-strength environments. These combined effects enable direct biomarker detection without sample dilution. This work establishes flexoelectric resonance as a general strategy for improving nanoscale biosensing performance in physiologically relevant conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种基于硅纳米线场效应晶体管中挠曲电共振的生物传感方法。通过施加射频电场在纳米线中产生应变梯度，形成挠曲电极化并在共振频率下放大，从而增强对小表面电荷变化的灵敏度。以C反应蛋白为模型，检测灵敏度提升了一个数量级（电导增加62% vs 30%），并减少了德拜屏蔽效应，实现了在高离子强度生理液中的直接检测，无需稀释样品。
AI.motivation: 生理液中生物标志物的灵敏检测常受德拜屏蔽效应限制，该效应会屏蔽传感器表面的静电信号，导致传统方法在高离子强度环境下的灵敏度大幅下降。现有方法通常需要稀释样品来缓解这一问题，但稀释会降低目标分析物浓度并增加操作复杂性。因此，亟需一种能够在生理相关条件下实现高灵敏度直接检测的新策略。
AI.method: 作者利用硅纳米线场效应晶体管，施加射频电场在纳米线中产生机械应变梯度，从而激发挠曲电效应。挠曲电极化在共振频率下被显著放大，增强了纳米线对表面电荷变化的电导响应。同时，高频电场扰动双电层，减少德拜屏蔽效应。实验以C反应蛋白为模型生物标志物进行验证，比较了有无射频调制下的检测性能。
AI.result: 与传统操作模式相比，该方法检测灵敏度提升了一个数量级：射频调制下电导增加62%，而传统模式下仅增加30%。此外，高射频场有效抑制了德拜屏蔽效应，使得在生理离子强度环境中无需样品稀释即可实现直接检测。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了挠曲电共振技术是提升纳米级生物传感器在生理相关条件下检测性能的一种通用策略，有效克服了德拜屏蔽限制，为高灵敏度、免稀释的临床诊断检测开辟了新途径。

title: Optimal current-based sensing of phonon temperature using a finite reservoir
summary: In realistic nanoscale transport set-ups, electron-phonon coupling leads to the exchange of heat between phonon baths and electronic reservoirs with finite heat capacities. Such exchange affects the finite reservoir's temperature. However, this sensitivity of the finite reservoir temperature to the exchange of heat with the finite reservoir has remained unexplored for thermometry. Here, we fill this gap by combining current metrology techniques with a thermodynamic framework encompassing finite reservoirs. We focus on an experimentally realizable set-up with a quantum dot coupled to a finite reservoir and consider two distinct current-based strategies in the long time limit, namely monitoring quanta exchanged between the quantum dot and finite reservoir and the measurement of the total current flowing from the quantum dot into an infinite reservoir. A third strategy involves measurements of the quantum dot occupation. For a large but finite reservoir, we show that the Fisher information for all three strategies captures the finite reservoir's contribution to sensitivity through common factors. We also demonstrate that monitoring quanta exchanged between the system and finite reservoir in the long time limit achieves optimal precision. Finally, we provide an optimization analysis that explores how maximal precision can be achieved within each of the current-based strategies by tuning the gate voltage.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了纳米尺度输运中，电子-声子耦合导致有限热容储热库温度变化，并利用电流计量技术和热力学框架探索了基于量子点的三种测温策略（监测量子点与有限储热库交换量子、测量流入无限储热库的总电流、测量量子点占据数），发现Fisher信息能捕捉有限储热库对灵敏度的贡献，且监测交换量子策略在长时间极限下达到最优精度。
AI.motivation: 先前研究忽视了有限储热库温度对热交换的敏感性在测温中的应用，本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 将电流计量技术与包含有限储热库的热力学框架结合，针对量子点耦合有限储热库的实验设置，考虑三种电流/占据数测量策略，分析Fisher信息并优化栅极电压。
AI.result: 三种策略的Fisher信息均能通过共同因子捕捉有限储热库的贡献；监测量子点与有限储热库间交换量子的策略在长时间极限下达到最优精度；通过调节栅极电压可在电流策略中实现最大精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文为有限储热库条件下的纳米尺度测温提供了理论框架和最优测量策略。

title: Phase-Transition Induced Domain Evolution and Magnetization Dynamics in FePt/FeRh Bilayers for Efficient Heat-Assisted Magnetic Recording
summary: Achieving ultrahigh recording densities with low power consumption is a central challenge for next generation heat assisted magnetic recording (HAMR), as conventional L10 FePt media require intense laser heating due to their high coercivity (Hc) and high Curie temperature (700 K). Here, we address this issue using FePt/FeRh bilayers, where the antiferromagnetic to ferromagnetic transition of FeRh near 350 K generates strong interfacial exchange coupling that assists magnetization switching in the FePt layer. Magnetometry measurements reveal a 40% reduction in Hc from 300 K to 400 K in the bilayer, compared to only 8% in single layer FePt. Temperature dependent MFM directly captures phase transition induced domain evolution, showing a 30% reduction in domain size and enhanced phase contrast. TR-MOKE measurements reveal only a minor (0.4 T) modification of the effective anisotropy field during phase transition, confirming that the intrinsic anisotropy of FePt remains largely preserved. These results demonstrate that the reduction in Hc in FePt/FeRh bilayers is primarily governed by phase transition induced domain wall mobility coupled with interfacial magnetic interactions, rather than by intrinsic anisotropy softening. This mechanism provides a pathway toward efficient magnetization switching under reduced thermal load, making FePt/FeRh heterostructures promising candidates for advanced HAMR media.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FePt/FeRh双层膜结构，利用FeRh在350K附近的反铁磁-铁磁相变产生的界面交换耦合辅助FePt磁化翻转，在保持FePt本征各向异性的同时将矫顽力降低40%，为低功耗热辅助磁记录（HAMR）提供了新路径。
AI.motivation: 传统L10 FePt介质需要强激光加热（高矫顽力Hc、高居里温度700K），功耗过高，亟需在低热负载下实现高效磁化翻转的机制。
AI.method: 制备FePt/FeRh双层膜，利用FeRh在~350K的反铁磁-铁磁相变产生界面交换耦合；通过磁强计测量（Magnetometry）、温度依赖磁力显微镜（MFM）、时间分辨磁光克尔效应（TR-MOKE）表征磁性能变化。
AI.result: FePt/FeRh双层膜在300K至400K间矫顽力Hc降低40%（单层FePt仅降8%）；MFM显示相变导致磁畴尺寸缩小30%、相位对比增强；TR-MOKE表明有效各向异性场仅改变0.4T，本征各向异性基本保持。
AI.conclusion: FePt/FeRh双层膜Hc降低主要归因于相变诱导的畴壁迁移率提升和界面磁相互作用，而非本征各向异性软化；这种机制可在降低热负载的同时实现高效磁化翻转，FePt/FeRh异质结构是先进HAMR介质的理想候选。

title: Dimensionality-Driven Electronic and Orbital Transitions Mediating Interfacial Magnetism in LaNiO3/CaMnO3 Observed In Situ
summary: Emergent magnetic states at oxide interfaces arise from the interplay of charge transfer, orbital reconstruction, and dimensional confinement, offering a route to engineered correlated-electron behavior in nanoscale spintronic materials. Here, we combine in situ synthesis, polarization-dependent angle-resolved photoelectron spectroscopy, X-ray magnetic circular dichroism, and first-principles electronic-structure calculations to investigate LaNiO3/CaMnO3 superlattices. We show that reducing the LaNiO3 thickness drives a metal-insulator transition accompanied by loss of electronic coherence and an orbital-polarization crossover in the ultrathin limit. These changes weaken charge transfer across the interface and suppress the interfacial Mn magnetic moment in CaMnO3, revealing that the emergent ferromagnetic state is directly governed by electronic confinement in LaNiO3. The insulating state and orbital reconstruction are reproduced by density functional theory combined with dynamical mean-field theory. Together, these results establish a direct and tunable coupling among electronic, orbital, and magnetic degrees of freedom in oxide heterostructures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验和理论计算，揭示了LaNiO3/CaMnO3超晶格中电子限域效应对界面磁性的调控机制：LaNiO3厚度减少引发金属-绝缘体转变、轨道重构，进而削弱电荷转移并抑制CaMnO3的界面磁矩，建立了电子、轨道和磁自由度之间的直接耦合关系。
AI.motivation: 探索氧化物异质界面处由电荷转移、轨道重构和维度限域共同作用产生的新兴磁性态，理解其微观机制以设计纳米自旋电子材料。
AI.method: 结合原位合成、偏振依赖角分辨光电子能谱、X射线磁圆二色性、第一性原理电子结构计算（DFT+DMFT），系统研究LaNiO3/CaMnO3超晶格。
AI.result: 发现LaNiO3厚度减小引发金属-绝缘体转变、电子相干性丧失和轨道极化交叉；这些变化削弱界面电荷转移，抑制CaMnO3中Mn的界面磁矩；证明铁磁态受LaNiO3中电子限域直接调控。
AI.conclusion: 在氧化物异质结构中，电子、轨道和磁自由度之间存在直接且可调的耦合，为设计关联电子体系的自旋电子材料提供了新途径。

title: Machine Learning and Molecular Simulations Reveal Mechanisms of ZIFs Polymorph Selection
summary: Zn(imidazolate)$_2$ metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) exhibit a remarkable degree of polymorphism. Because of their promising industrial applications, many research groups have investigated phase transitions, phase diagram and relative stability of these polymorphs. There is now wide consensus in the research community that these MOFs are solvothermally formed via non-classical nucleation mechanisms, in which pre-nucleation clusters are first formed, followed by an intermediate amorphous structure that subsequently reorganizes to yield the final crystalline MOF. However, no study up to date has uncovered which part of the synthesis process determines the final polymorph obtained. In this work, path collective variable metadynamics simulations performed with a partially reactive force field give insights into mechanistic and thermodynamic aspects of the self-assembly of these MOFs. Databases of transient and intermediate synthesis structures are built from the simulations. By developing and applying neural network classifiers over these databases, it is found that both pre-nucleation clusters and the amorphous intermediate structures are polymorph-dependent. These results suggest that polymorph selection happens as early as the pre-nucleation cluster stage.

AI.tldr: 通过结合路径集体变量元动力学模拟和神经网络分类器，发现Zn(imidazolate)₂ MOF的多晶型选择早在预成核团簇阶段就已发生，而非传统认为的后期无定形中间体重组阶段。
AI.motivation: 尽管已知Zn(咪唑酯)₂ MOF通过非经典成核机制（预成核团簇→无定形中间体→晶体）形成，但此前研究未能确定合成过程中哪个阶段决定了最终获得的多晶型物，因此作者希望揭示多晶型选择的关键阶段。
AI.method: 使用路径集体变量元动力学模拟（结合部分反应力场）生成合成过程的瞬态和中间结构数据库，然后开发并应用神经网络分类器对这些数据库进行分析。
AI.result: 发现预成核团簇和无定形中间体结构均具有多晶型依赖性，神经网络分类器能够区分不同多晶型对应的早期结构。
AI.conclusion: 多晶型选择在预成核团簇阶段就已经发生，而非此前认为的后期无定形重排阶段。

title: The optical phonoelectric effect
summary: Piezoelectricity is a technologically important property of certain insulators in which mechanical strain induces an electrical polarization. However, the rate at which a piezoelectric response can be established over a macroscopic volume is limited by the sound velocity, constraining applications in high-bit-rate transduction and sensing. Furthermore, the strength of the piezoelectric effect is not readily tunable, as it depends on intrinsic anharmonic coupling between strain and intra-unit-cell distortions in a given material. Lastly, the maximum amplitude of the effect is bounded by material fracture, which sets in already at percent level strain values. Here we overcome these limitations by realizing a strain-free, piezoelectric-like response driven solely by photo-excited optical phonon distortions. We demonstrate such optical phonoelectricity in the weak piezoelectric BPO$_4$, in which we induce electrical polarization through phonon rectification. This effect is established over macroscopic volumes with four orders of magnitude higher speed than piezoelectric responses, ultimately limited by the speed of light. The maximum induced polarization is estimated to be far in excess of that attainable through strain at the fracture limit. Ultrafast phonoelectricity opens up new opportunities for optical control in quantum materials, but also for device applications.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种通过光激发光学声子畸变实现的无应变类压电效应（光声电效应），在BPO₄中实现了比传统压电效应快四个数量级（光速极限）、远超材料断裂极限的巨极化响应，克服了传统压电效应受声速、不可调谐性和断裂限制的三大瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 传统压电效应存在三个根本性局限：1) 响应建立速度受声速限制，制约高比特率换能与传感应用；2) 效应强度不可调谐，取决于材料的本征非谐耦合；3) 最大振幅受材料断裂限制（仅百分之几应变）。本文旨在克服这些限制。
AI.method: 利用光激发光学声子畸变在弱压电材料BPO₄中实现类压电响应，通过声子整流效应诱导电极化，无需任何机械应变。
AI.result: 1) 建立的响应速度比传统压电效应快四个数量级，最终受光速限制；2) 最大诱导极化远超应变在断裂极限下所能达到的极化强度；3) 在宏观体积上实现了无应变的类压电效应。
AI.conclusion: 超快声电效应为量子材料中的光学调控及器件应用开辟了新途径。

title: Deep Strong light-matter Coupling in 3D Kane Fermions
summary: Deep strong light-matter coupling represents an extreme non-perturbative regime of quantum electrodynamics, in which the interaction strength exceeds the bare frequencies of the uncoupled systems. The ground state features strong quantum correlations between photons and matter excitations, and new cavity-driven phase transitions are expected to occur. Whether a superradiant quantum phase transition, marked by spontaneous dipole ordering and photon condensation, is possible has remained a long-standing and controversial question. Such phenomena have been proposed to arise in exotic electronic systems hosting Dirac and Kane fermions, owing to the formal absence of an $A^2$ term in their low-energy Hamiltonian. Here we exploit the ultralow effective mass of Kane fermions to realise Landau polaritons in a bulk mercury cadmium telluride layer coupled to a Fabry-Perot resonator. Using thermally tunable carrier density, we continuously tune the coupling from the weak to the deep-strong regime, achieving a record normalised coupling ratio exceeding 1.6 above room temperature. The measured polariton spectra are in excellent agreement with a rigorous, gauge-invariant microscopic theory. Despite the nonlinear Landau level structure of relativistic Kane fermions, we show that a diamagnetic $A^2$ term naturally emerges and precludes a superradiant phase transition. These results resolve the long-standing controversy surrounding cavity quantum electrodynamics of relativistic-like matter systems, extend deep-strong-coupling physics to Kane fermions, and open new opportunities for polaritonic semiconductor devices operating in extreme light-matter coupling regimes.

AI.tldr: 本文通过将汞镉碲块体材料中的Kane费米子与法布里-珀罗谐振腔耦合，实现了从弱耦合到深强耦合的连续调控，归一化耦合比超过1.6。实验发现，尽管Kane费米子具有相对论性特征，但抗磁A²项自然出现，阻止了超辐射量子相变，解决了长期存在的争议。
AI.motivation: 探索深强光-物质耦合这一极端非微扰量子电动力学区域，并解决关于超辐射量子相变（自发偶极有序和光子凝聚）是否可能发生的长期争议。
AI.method: 利用Kane费米子的超低有效质量，在块体汞镉碲层中实现朗道极化子，并将其耦合到法布里-珀罗谐振腔中。通过热可调载流子密度，连续调节耦合强度从弱耦合到深强耦合区域。
AI.result: 实现了室温以上归一化耦合比超过1.6的深强耦合；测量到的极化子光谱与严格的规范不变微观理论高度一致；发现抗磁A²项自然出现，排除了超辐射量子相变的可能性。
AI.conclusion: 实验结果解决了关于相对论性物质系统腔量子电动力学的长期争议，将深强耦合物理扩展到Kane费米子系统，并为极端光-物质耦合区域下的极化子半导体器件开辟了新机遇。

title: The second altermagnet candidate in organic conductors: $κ$-(BEDT-TTF)$_2$$m$-HOOCC$_6$H$_4$SO$_3$
summary: We have developed a novel BEDT-TTF-based organic conductor, $κ$-(BEDT-TTF)$_2 m$-HOOCC$_6$H$_4$SO$_3$ ($κ$-$m$-SBA), and propose it as a candidate for altermagnet. Tight-binding band calculations of $κ$-$m$-SBA provide a $t'/t$ of 1.01 at 100 K, indicating that the spin structure is closely aligned to an equilateral triangle ($t'/t= 1$). While most $κ$-type BEDT-TTF-based salts become spin liquids due to the spin frustration caused by the triangular lattice, $κ$-$m$-SBA surprisingly shows a weak ferromagnetic transition at $T_\mathrm{N} = 14$ K due to a canted antiferromagnetic (AFM) spin structure. Until recently, $κ$-(BEDT-TTF)$_2$Cu[N(CN)$_2$]Cl ($κ$-Cl) was the only $κ$-type organic conductor known to exhibit this order, and it is also recognized as the first candidate for altermagnetism in organic conductors. This was theoretically predicted by Naka et al. in 2019, who demonstrated that $κ$-type organic conductors can be candidates for altermagnetism if they display such order. Consequently, $κ$-$m$-SBA can be considered the second candidate for altermagnetism in organic conductors. Furthermore, numerical calculations demonstrate a characteristic of altermagnets in $κ$-$m$-SBA, namely spin splitting of energy bands.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种新型有机导体κ-(BEDT-TTF)₂m-HOOCC₆H₄SO₃ (κ-m-SBA)，并将其提出作为交变磁体的候选材料。该材料在100K时具有接近等边三角形的自旋结构(t'/t=1.01)，并在14K时表现出弱铁磁转变（源于倾斜反铁磁自旋结构），成为继κ-Cl之后有机导体中的第二个交变磁体候选物。数值计算证实了其能带的自旋劈裂特征。
AI.motivation: 探索κ型BEDT-TTF基有机导体中新的交变磁体候选材料，以拓展有机交变磁体的研究领域。大多数κ型盐由于三角晶格的自旋阻挫形成自旋液体，而κ-m-SBA却出人意料地表现出弱铁磁转变，这使其成为研究交变磁性的理想平台。
AI.method: 合成了新型有机导体κ-m-SBA；通过紧束缚能带计算获得t'/t比值为1.01（100K），表明自旋结构接近等边三角形；进行磁性和数值计算分析其交变磁体特性。
AI.result: κ-m-SBA在TN=14K时表现出弱铁磁转变（源于倾斜反铁磁自旋结构）；紧束缚计算显示其自旋结构接近等边三角形(t'/t=1.01)；数值计算证明了能带的自旋劈裂这一交变磁体的特征。
AI.conclusion: κ-m-SBA是继κ-Cl之后有机导体中第二个交变磁体候选材料，它拓宽了有机交变磁体的研究范围，为探索有机材料中的交变磁性提供了新的平台。

title: g-tensor Optimization in Ge/SiGe Quantum Dots
summary: Planar germanium heterostructures hosting hole-spin qubits are among the leading platforms for scalable semiconductor-based quantum computing. Yet, device performance is hindered by significant quantum dot variability, which leads to uncertainty in qubit energy levels and random orientations of the spin quantization axis. Tailored control of the g-tensor offers a strategy to overcome these limitations and achieve more reliable qubit operations. Here, we introduce a flexible optimization framework for engineering g-tensor properties. As a benchmark, we numerically obtain the optimal reshaping of the out-of-plane potential in a SiGe-Ge-SiGe quantum well to suppress the in-plane g-tensor components and realize the recently proposed gapless single-spin qubit encoding. This reshaping is achieved through heterostructure engineering, specifically by adjusting the silicon concentration within the quantum well, though the framework remains readily adaptable to alternative design objectives. Our results provide practical design principles for improving the tunability of the spin response, paving the way towards large-scale germanium-based quantum computers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种灵活的优化框架，用于工程化锗基异质结构中的g-张量特性，通过调控量子阱内硅浓度重塑面外势阱，抑制面内g-张量分量，实现无间隙单自旋量子比特编码，为大规模锗基量子计算机提供了实用设计原则。
AI.motivation: 平面锗异质结构中的空穴自旋量子比特是半导体量子计算的重要平台，但量子点变异性导致能级不确定性和自旋量子化轴随机取向，严重制约器件性能。需要一种对g-张量的定制化控制策略来克服这些限制。
AI.method: 提出了一种灵活的优化框架，以SiGe-Ge-SiGe量子阱中面外势垒的重塑为基准，通过调整量子阱内硅浓度实现异质结构工程化，从而抑制面内g-张量分量，实现无间隙单自旋量子比特编码。该框架可灵活适配其他设计目标。
AI.result: 数值优化结果表明，通过调整硅浓度重塑面外势垒，可有效抑制面内g-张量分量，成功实现无间隙单自旋量子比特编码，验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 为改善自旋响应的可调性提供了实用设计原则，为大规模锗基量子计算机的实现铺平了道路。

title: Theory for the mixed alkali effect in glasses
summary: The mixed alkali or mixed mobile ion effect in glasses manifests itself by strong nonlinear variations of ionic transport properties upon mixing of different types of mobile ions. We develop a theory for this effect based on thermally activated hopping transport in disordered site energy landscapes that consistently incorporates the statistical-mechanical and kinetic aspects of a mobile ion mixture. This includes a consideration of the joint probability density of site energy states, generalized Fermi distributions for mean site occupations, and cross-terms in the current response described by nondiagonal Onsager coefficients. The theory shows that a mixed alkali effect can arise even when the two ion species share identical site energy distributions. It suffices that sites have distinct energies when occupied by ions of different type. Taking into account that a mismatch energy is needed for ions of one type to occupy sites adapted to the other type, the mixed alkali effect becomes stronger. Spatial correlations between site energies are needed for the mobility of the majority ion to decrease stronger than exponential upon replacement by the minority ion. The theory agrees well with kinetic Monte Carlo simulations. Application to mixed alkali phosphate glasses yields good agreement with measured conductivity activation energies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于热激活跳跃输运和 disordered 位点能量景观的理论，系统地解释了混合碱/混合移动离子效应，该效应表现为离子混合时输运性质的非线性变化。理论指出，即使两种离子共享相同的位点能量分布，只要不同离子占据时位点能量不同，混合效应就会出现；错配能量和空间相关性进一步增强了该效应。理论与动力学蒙特卡洛模拟及实验数据吻合良好。
AI.motivation: 混合碱/混合移动离子效应在玻璃材料中表现为离子输运性质的非线性变化，现有理论对其中统计力学和动力学机制的理解尚不充分。本文旨在开发一个自洽的理论框架，统一描述混合离子系统中热激活跳跃输运的统计力学和动力学方面，从而揭示该效应的根本起源。
AI.method: 基于无序位点能量景观中的热激活跳跃输运模型，引入：(1) 位点能量状态的联合概率密度；(2) 广义费米分布描述平均位点占据；(3) 非对角Onsager系数描述电流响应中的交叉项。考虑不同离子占据同一位置时具有不同的能量（错配能），以及位点能量之间的空间相关性。
AI.result: (1) 即使两种离子共享相同的位点能量分布，只要不同离子占据时位点能量不同，混合碱效应即可出现；(2) 错配能量会增强该效应；(3) 位点能量的空间相关性是多数离子迁移率在替换为少数离子时出现超指数下降的必要条件；(4) 理论与动力学蒙特卡洛模拟吻合良好，应用于混合碱磷酸盐玻璃时与实验测量的电导活化能一致。
AI.conclusion: 该理论成功解释了混合碱效应的核心机制，提供了从微观热激活跳跃输运角度理解混合离子系统非线性行为的统一框架，且具有实验验证的可信度。

title: Conditional Generative Models Enable Targeted Exploration of MAX Phase Design Space
summary: MAX phases (M$_{n+1}$AX$_n$), precursors to MXenes, span a vast compositional space, motivating efficient computational screening for synthesisable candidates. We employ CrystaLLM$-π$, a large language model fine-tuned on 6,179 double transition-metal MAX phases, and demonstrate its ability to generate out-of-sample structures consistent with known experimental trends. Using a conditioning vector with two dimensions (a statistically derived MXene derivative count and a surrogate for A-site binding energy), the model was able to target MXene-favourable regions of phase space for generation. Specific condition vectors double novel stable structure generation rates versus unconditioned baselines. Of ten compositionally novel candidates, five exhibit DFT-validated stability ($E_{hull} < 0.050$ eV/atom). This work showcases the potential for autoregressive generative models to explore targeted materials' spaces, offering a scalable framework for accelerated discovery in compositionally complex systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CrystaLLM-π，一个基于大型语言模型的生成框架，通过条件向量控制生成偏向MXene有利相空间的MAX相结构，将新型稳定结构的生成率提升至无条件基线的两倍，并在10个组成新颖的候选物中发现了5个经DFT验证稳定的结构。
AI.motivation: MAX相（MXene前驱体）具有巨大的组成空间，亟需高效的计算筛选方法来寻找可合成的候选材料，以加速材料发现。
AI.method: 基于6179个双过渡金属MAX相数据微调大型语言模型CrystaLLM-π，使用包含MXene衍生物计数和A位结合能代理的二维条件向量，引导模型生成偏向MXene有利相区的结构。
AI.result: 条件向量使新型稳定结构生成率相比无条件基线提高两倍；10个组成新颖的候选物中5个通过DFT验证具有稳定性（E_hull < 0.050 eV/atom）。
AI.conclusion: 自回归生成模型能够有效探索定向材料空间，为组成复杂体系中的加速发现提供了可扩展的框架。

title: Giant Spin Magnetization from Quantum Geometry in Altermagnets
summary: Altermagnets host spin-split band structures while exhibiting vanishing equilibrium spin magnetization, making field-induced responses a direct probe of their quantum geometry. A central question, in this regard, is which quantum-geometric mechanism can generate a linear spin magnetization in centrosymmetric systems. Here we develop a unified framework based on a generalized quantum geometric tensor that incorporates both momentum translations and spin rotations of Bloch states, and decompose spin magnetization into equilibrium, electric-field-driven, and magnetic-field-driven contributions. We show that inversion symmetry forbids the linear electric-field response in centrosymmetric systems, while $C_n T$ symmetry further suppresses the equilibrium contribution in altermagnets. Consequently, centrosymmetric altermagnets provide a particularly clean realization in which the magnetic-field-induced spin magnetization emerges as the only symmetry-allowed linear quantum-geometric response. We demonstrate that this contribution originates entirely from the spin-rotation quantum metric, establishing it as the sole linear quantum-geometric mechanism in such systems. Using representative centrosymmetric altermagnets, including the $d$-wave compound $\mathrm{FeSb}_2$ and the $g$-wave compound $\mathrm{CrSb}$, we show that the spin-rotation quantum metric directly controls this response. Crucially, we predict a giant linear spin magnetization of order $10^{-2}μ_B\,\mathrm{nm}^{-3}$ at magnetic fields of $\sim 10\,\mathrm{mT}$, exceeding typical experimental values for conventional magnets by several orders of magnitude. Our results identify a universal quantum geometric mechanism of spin magnetization operative in centrosymmetric systems in general, and establish centrosymmetric altermagnets as an ideal platform for its experimental detection with potential applications in spintronics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个统一的量子几何框架，证明中心对称交变磁体（altermagnets）中唯一的线性量子几何自旋磁化响应来自磁场驱动的自旋旋转量子度量（spin-rotation quantum metric），并在FeSb₂和CrSb等材料中预测了高达10⁻² μ_B·nm⁻³的巨线性自旋磁化，比传统磁体高出几个数量级。
AI.motivation: 中心对称系统中何种量子几何机制能产生线性自旋磁化这一核心问题尚未明确，尤其是在交变磁体这类具有自旋分裂能带但零平衡磁化的系统中。
AI.method: 构建了广义量子几何张量统一框架，将布洛赫态的动量平移和自旋旋转纳入考量；将自旋磁化分解为平衡、电场驱动和磁场驱动三部分，并通过对称性分析筛选出唯一的线性响应通道。
AI.result: 在中心对称交变磁体中，磁场驱动的自旋磁化是唯一对称性允许的线性量子几何响应，完全源于自旋旋转量子度量。在FeSb₂和CrSb中预测磁场~10 mT下产生~10⁻² μ_B·nm⁻³的巨线性自旋磁化。
AI.conclusion: 确定了中心对称系统中自旋磁化的普适量子几何机制，建立了中心对称交变磁体作为实验探测该效应的理想平台，具有自旋电子学应用潜力。

title: Emergent electric fields driven by phonon-coupled skyrmion resonances
summary: We develop a coarse-grained theoretical description of the macroscopic emergent electric field generated by phonon-coupled lattice deformations in the breathing and rotational dynamics of a skyrmion lattice under microwave excitation. The analysis identifies the symmetry and dynamical conditions that yield rectified (dc) and oscillating (ac) electric fields, even in the absence of net translational motion of the skyrmion lattice, particularly in the dilute-lattice limit. Using experimentally measurable skyrmion profile parameters such as the equilibrium radius, domain-wall width, and dynamical resonance frequency of skyrmion lattice, the model further enables identification of harmonic components contributing to the observed macroscopic electrodynamic response in the long-wavelength phonon limit ($q \to 0$) and at finite phonon frequency, providing a unified framework for phonon-driven spin-charge-lattice coupling in topological magnets.

AI.tldr: 本文发展了一个粗粒化理论模型，描述在微波激发下，斯格明子晶格中由声子耦合的晶格形变产生的宏观涌现电场，重点分析了稀晶格极限下非平移运动产生的交直流电场成分及谐波响应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对斯格明子晶格在微波激发下的电动力学响应缺乏统一的理论框架，尤其是晶格变形（而非平移运动）对宏观电场的贡献机制尚不清晰，亟需建立声子驱动的自旋-电荷-晶格耦合理论。
AI.method: 采用粗粒化理论描述，基于可测量的斯格明子轮廓参数（平衡半径、畴壁宽度、动力学共振频率）建立模型，在长波声子极限和有限频率下分析对称性与动力学条件。
AI.result: 识别出产生整流直流（dc）和振荡交流（ac）电场的对称性与动力学条件；在稀晶格极限下即使无净平移运动也能产生电场；明确了谐波分量对宏观电动力学响应的贡献。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为拓扑磁体中的声子驱动自旋-电荷-晶格耦合提供了统一的理论框架，有助于理解斯格明子晶格在微波激发下的电动力学行为。

title: Observation of the Magnus Nonlinear Hall effect from Chiral Weyl Monopoles
summary: The nonlinear Hall effect (NLHE) connects crystalline symmetry to quantum geometry, offering a probe of band topology beyond linear transport. While most studies have focused on the Berry curvature dipole in low-symmetry crystals, mechanisms that directly probe Berry monopoles in higher-symmetry chiral lattices remain unexplored. Here, we report the observations of the NLHE in the chiral Weyl semimetal CoSi, a platform where the Berry curvature dipole is symmetry-forbidden. By employing focused ion beam-fabricated crossbar devices, we detect a robust second-harmonic Hall voltage under zero magnetic field, hosting all key signatures of the NLHE. Theoretical analysis attributes the nonlinear Hall conductivity to skew scattering of self-rotating electron wave packets, whose chirality is dictated by the underlying band topology, a process reminiscent of the classical Magnus effect. Furthermore, the NLHE signal exhibits a temperature-dependent sign reversal, and a strong, linearly field-dependent modulation that grows with carrier mobility, directly reflecting the topological Weyl nodes distribution near the Fermi level. These findings establish CoSi as a platform for Berry monopole-driven nonlinear transport, demonstrating a skew-scattering route to topological nonlinear Hall responses that bypasses conventional symmetry constraints.

AI.tldr: 本文在 chiral Weyl 半金属 CoSi 中观察到非线性霍尔效应（NLHE），其源于 Berry 磁单极子驱动的 skew scattering，而非传统的 Berry 曲率偶极子机制，并展现了温度依赖的符号反转和线性场调制等关键特征。
AI.motivation: 以往 NLHE 研究多聚焦于低对称性晶体中的 Berry 曲率偶极子，缺乏对高对称性手性晶格中直接探测 Berry 磁单极子机制的探索。
AI.method: 使用聚焦离子束制备的交叉结器件，在零磁场下测量 CoSi 的二次谐波霍尔电压；结合理论分析，将非线性霍尔电导归因于自旋电子波包的 skew scattering（类似于 Magnus 效应）。
AI.result: 观测到零磁场下健壮的二次谐波霍尔信号；NLHE 信号呈现温度依赖的符号反转，以及随迁移率增长的线性场调制；理论表明该效应直接反映费米面附近拓扑 Weyl 节点的分布。
AI.conclusion: CoSi 是 Berry 磁单极子驱动非线性输运的平台，提出了绕过传统对称性约束的 skew-scattering 拓扑非线性霍尔响应机制。

title: On the proposed concept of mechanical phasons in Ni-Mn-Ga modulated martensite
comment: Manuscript submitted to Journal of Materials Research (JMRS)
summary: We discuss modulation phasons as a possible source of unusual elastic behavior of five-layer modulated (10\,M) martensite of the Ni-Mn-Ga shape memory alloy. This material exhibits anomalous macroscopic shear compliance along specific planes perpendicular to the modulation vector, and this compliance disappears when the modulations become incommensurate. Using a simple mechanical model, we show that modulation phasons in Ni-Mn-Ga can have macroscopic mechanical manifestations, and that the resulting 'mechanical phasons' can relax external shear loadings for commensurate and weakly incommensurate modulations, but not for strongly incommensurate modulations. The model merges ideas from the adaptive martensite theory and electronic-structure considerations, and enables straightforward explanations of several properties of the 10\,M lattice, such as spontaneous monoclinic distortion or easy formation and propagation of $a/b$ twins.

AI.tldr: 本文提出调制相子（modulation phasons）是Ni-Mn-Ga形状记忆合金中10M马氏体异常弹性行为的可能来源，通过机械模型证明相子可在宏观上松弛剪切载荷，解释了该材料的多种奇特力学性质。
AI.motivation: 解释Ni-Mn-Ga合金10M调制马氏体中观测到的反常宏观剪切柔度（沿特定垂直于调制矢量的平面），以及这种柔度在调制变为非公度时消失的现象。
AI.method: 构建简单机械模型，将调制相子概念与自适应马氏体理论及电子结构考虑相结合，分析不同公度性条件下相子对外部剪切载荷的响应。
AI.result: 调制相子在公度和弱非公度调制下能松弛外部剪切载荷，但在强非公度调制下无法松弛；模型成功解释了10M晶格的自发单斜畸变及a/b孪晶的易形成与传播等性质。
AI.conclusion: 调制相子具有宏观力学表现（"力学相子"），是理解Ni-Mn-Ga合金10M马氏体异常弹性行为的关键机制，为自适应马氏体理论提供了新的物理视角。

title: Intrinsic anomalous thermal hall effect as a signature of quantum metric in d-wave altermagnets
summary: We investigate the intrinsic anomalous thermal Hall effect in d-wave altermagnets, where a transverse heat current is generated by a longitudinal temperature gradient in the absence of a magnetic field, with the leading response proportional to $(\nabla T)^3$. In these systems, the intrinsic Berry curvature-driven linear and thermal quantum-metric-driven second-order anomalous thermal Hall currents vanish as a consequence of crystalline symmetry. We show that the first nonvanishing contribution arises at third order in the temperature gradient and is governed by a nonlinear thermal Berry-connection polarizability, a quantity introduced in this work. Our analysis reveals a distinctive angular dependence of the anomalous thermal Hall conductance as the applied thermal gradient is rotated with respect to the crystal axes. We also find characteristic temperature and chemical-potential dependences that can be tested experimentally. These results identify unique quantum geometry-induced thermal responses and establish altermagnets as a promising platform for exploring intrinsic (i.e., scattering-time-independent) geometric transport phenomena.

AI.tldr: 本文研究d波交变磁体中的本征反常热霍尔效应，发现横向热流由纵向温度梯度产生（无外磁场），且主导响应与$(\nabla T)^3$成正比。传统线性Berry曲率和二阶量子度量驱动的贡献因晶体对称性消失，首个非零贡献出现在温度梯度的三阶，由新引入的非线性热Berry联络极化率主导。该效应具有独特的角分布及温度/化学势依赖，可在实验中检验，为探索本征几何输运现象提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 探究d波交变磁体中是否存在本征反常热霍尔效应，并揭示其量子几何起源。
AI.method: 理论分析Berry曲率、量子度量及新定义的非线性热Berry联络极化率对热霍尔响应的贡献，结合晶体对称性约束。
AI.result: 发现线性及二阶热霍尔电流因对称性为零，首个非零贡献出现在三阶，由非线性热Berry联络极化率主导；揭示了角分布及温度/化学势依赖特征。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体是研究本征（不依赖散射时间）几何输运现象的独特平台，该工作为实验探测提供了可验证的预测。

title: Data-Efficient Indentation Size Effect Correction in Steels Using Machine Learning and Physics-Guided Augmentation
summary: Shallow nanoindentation enables mechanical characterization of thin films, individual phases and other volume-constrained materials, but measured hardness is often inflated by the indentation size effect (ISE), contact-area errors and tip-geometry artifacts. Classical ISE corrections such as the Nix-Gao require a deep linear regime and are unreliable when only shallow measurements are used. This study investigates how a small experimental dataset can be used to predict a reference hardness with physics-guided feature engineering and augmentation. Approximately 700 experimental indentations were collected from three steel reference specimens covering a hardness range of 2-6.5 GPa and augmented using physically motivated variations representing instrumental noise, session-level drift, and local multiphase boundary blending. The input space combined Oliver-Pharr values with mechanics descriptors, including indentation work partitioning, ($H\text{/}E_{r}$), and the area-invariant compliance proxy ($P_{\max}\text{/}S^{2}$). Ridge Regression (RR), Random Forest, XGBoost, and Neural Networks (NN) were evaluated using a quarantined fourth steel specimen tested at staggered loads. The hardness mapping was nonlinear: RR failed, whereas nonlinear models achieved ($R^2 > 0.98$) internally. A constrained (64-8-64) NN gave the best results, reaching RMSE = 0.470 GPa, MAPE = 5.4% on the quarantined steel. Unlike Nix-Gao analysis, the NN produced stable estimates in the shallow regime. SHAP and latent-space analysis showed reliance on area-invariant and energy-based descriptors. The results demonstrate the feasibility of a this workflow for ISE correction in steels using small datasets and suggest a pathway toward data-efficient characterization of any volume constrained materials.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用约700次实验压痕数据和物理引导的特征工程，结合数据增强，训练神经网络模型（64-8-64结构）校正浅层纳米压痕的尺寸效应，在隔离钢材上达到RMSE=0.470 GPa, MAPE=5.4%，优于传统Nix-Gao方法，为体积受限材料提供了一种数据高效的力学表征路径。
AI.motivation: 浅层纳米压痕测量硬度时，尺寸效应、接触面积误差和针尖几何伪影会严重膨胀测量值；传统Nix-Gao校正需要深压痕线性区，当仅有浅层数据时不可靠。因此，需要一种利用小数据集即可预测参考硬度的方法。
AI.method: 收集三种钢材标准样品约700次实验压痕数据，覆盖2-6.5 GPa硬度范围；采用物理引导的数据增强（仪器噪声、漂移、多相边界混合）；输入特征包括Oliver-Pharr值、压痕功分配、H/Er和面积不变柔量代理Pmax/S²；比较Ridge回归、随机森林、XGBoost和神经网络（NN）四种模型，以第四种钢材为隔离测试集。
AI.result: 非线性模型内部R²>0.98；最佳模型为约束NN（64-8-64结构），在隔离钢材上RMSE=0.470 GPa, MAPE=5.4%；在浅层区域NN产生稳定估计；SHAP和潜在空间分析表明模型依赖面积不变和基于能量的描述符。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在小数据集下实现了对钢材料浅层纳米压痕尺寸效应的有效校正，证明了物理引导特征工程与数据增强的可行性，为其他体积受限材料的表征提供了数据高效路径。

title: Generation of magnetic metal-organic frameworks
summary: The potential to utilize metal-organic frameworks as a replacement for rare earth materials as well as in technological applications has prompted increased interested in this material class. The simulation of organic materials, including metal-organic frameworks (MOFs), represents a computational challenge due to an increased average number of atoms in the unit cell. Compounding this challenge, modern materials databases are generally limited to inorganic structures due to their utility in modern technologies such as batteries and integrated circuits. Machine-learning tools appear ideally suited to study these systems. However, organic materials are generally underrepresented in the training sets of foundational models. In this work we leverage the the Organic Materials Database (OMDB) to create a training dataset comprised of more than 15,000 single-point first-principles computations for finetuning machine learned interatomic potentials. Specifically, we fine tune CHGNet and implement a site substitution workflow to identify novel, highly magnetic, MOFs from structural prototypes within the QMOF database.

AI.tldr: 本文利用有机材料数据库（OMDB）创建超过15,000个第一性原理计算数据，微调机器学习原子间势（CHGNet），并通过位点替换工作流程从QMOF数据库中识别新型高磁性金属有机框架（MOF）。
AI.motivation: MOF有望替代稀土材料，但模拟计算存在挑战（单元胞原子数多、数据库有限、机器学习模型训练数据中有机材料代表性不足），因此需要针对有机材料优化机器学习势函数。
AI.method: 利用OMDB创建超过15,000个单点第一性原理计算数据集，对CHGNet进行微调；结合位点替换工作流程，从QMOF数据库的结构原型中筛选新型高磁性MOF。
AI.result: 成功微调了CHGNet模型，并识别出新型高磁性MOF候选材料。
AI.conclusion: 通过数据增强和微调策略，提升了机器学习势函数在有机材料（尤其是MOF）上的预测能力，为加速发现新型功能MOF提供了有效途径。

title: Uniaxial strain-driven ferroelastic domain control in LaAlO3
summary: Multiferroic domain walls in functional oxides exhibit properties distinct from the bulk and are increasingly exploited as active elements in nanoelectronic and photonic devices. Deterministic control of domain populations has typically remained limited to local control, or removal with temperature. Here we demonstrate continuous, reversible manipulation of the ferroelastic domain structure in single-crystal LaAlO$_3$ using in-situ uniaxial strain. Combining atomic force microscopy, X-ray diffraction, and Raman spectroscopy with first-principles calculations we map the complete microscopic evolution of the twin domain population through the strain-driven transition from the rhombohedral $R\bar{3}c$ ground state toward the predicted orthorhombic $Fmmm$ phase. Applied strains below $0.5\%$ produce pronounced surface flattening and large-scale domain reorganisation, establishing uniaxial strain as a technically accessible control parameter for ferroelastic domain engineering. These results open a route to active, real-time programming of domain architectures in LaAlO$_3$-based heterostructures, with implications for strain-tunable superconducting interfaces, nanoscale phonon-polariton optics, and ultrafast lattice control.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了通过原位单轴应变对LaAlO₃单晶中铁弹畴结构进行连续、可逆操控，为铁弹畴工程提供了一种易实现的控制手段。
AI.motivation: 多铁性畴壁具有独特的性质，但传统上对畴群体的控制局限于局部操控或热消除，亟需一种全局、可逆的调控方法。
AI.method: 结合原子力显微镜、X射线衍射、拉曼光谱与第一性原理计算，系统研究了单轴应变驱动下LaAlO₃从R3̅c菱方相向Fmmm正交相转变过程中孪晶畴群体的微观演化。
AI.result: 低于0.5%的应变即可实现显著的表面平坦化和大规模畴重组，实现了应变驱动的完整畴演化图谱。
AI.conclusion: 单轴应变是技术上易实现的铁弹畴工程控制参数，为LaAlO₃基异质结中畴架构的主动实时编程开辟了道路，对应变可调超导界面、纳米声子极化激元光学和超快晶格控制有重要启示。

title: Anharmonic phonon coupling enabled by local inversion symmetry breaking at domain walls in ferroelastic
summary: In ferroelastic materials, spontaneous symmetry breaking leads to the formation of twin domains. Although the bulk crystal typically remains centrosymmetric, inversion symmetry can be locally broken at the domain walls, potentially changing phonon selection rules and enabling local anharmonic phonon coupling. Here we report direct evidence of such anharmonic coupling in ferroelastic LaAlO$_3$ using two-dimensional Raman-terahertz spectroscopy. We attribute the cross-peaks observed in the two-dimensional spectra to both mechanical and electrical anharmonicity between the $A_{1g}$ Raman-active phonon and the $E_g$ phonon, which acquires finite infrared activity through local inversion symmetry breaking at ferroelastic domain walls. These findings provide new insight into the complex lattice dynamics of ferroelastic materials and highlight the potential of two-dimensional Raman-terahertz spectroscopy to uncover subtle symmetry breaking through the detection of intrinsically weak anharmonic signals.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用二维拉曼-太赫兹光谱在铁弹材料LaAlO₃中直接观察到畴壁处局域反演对称性破缺导致的非简谐声子耦合，揭示了A₁g与E_g声子间的机械和电学非简谐性。
AI.motivation: 铁弹材料中畴壁处存在局域反演对称性破缺，可能改变声子选择定则并产生局域非简谐耦合，但缺乏直接实验证据。
AI.method: 采用二维拉曼-太赫兹光谱技术，观测铁弹体LaAlO₃中畴壁处的声子耦合信号。
AI.result: 在二维谱中观察到交叉峰，归因于A₁g拉曼活性声子与E_g声子（通过畴壁处局域反演对称性破缺获得有限红外活性）之间的机械和电学非简谐耦合。
AI.conclusion: 该工作揭示了铁弹材料中复杂的晶格动力学，并展示了二维拉曼-太赫兹光谱在探测微弱非简谐信号以揭示隐蔽对称性破缺方面的潜力。

title: Quantifying Thermal, Photovoltage, and Defect Contributions to Transient Absorption of Ta$_{3}$N$_{5}$ Photoanodes
comment: 30 pages, 5 figures in the main manuscript; 8 pages, 8 figures in the supporting information
summary: Ta$_{3}$N$_{5}$ is among the most intensively studied photoanode materials for solar-driven water oxidation, yet its performance often remains limited by short carrier lifetimes and defect mediated recombination. Although transient absorption spectroscopy is widely used to probe carrier dynamics in photoelectrodes, spectral assignments are frequently ambiguous due to overlapping contributions. Here, microsecond-to-second transient absorption of Ta$_{3}$N$_{5}$ thin films is combined with complementary optical spectroscopies to disentangle contributions from lattice heating, electrostatics, and defect states. Photoreflectance reveals three critical points in the Ta$_{3}$N$_{5}$ band structure, including two anisotropic near-edge transitions at 2.14 eV and 2.27 eV and a higher-lying transition near 2.80 eV, all closely aligned with dominant transient absorption features. A previously unreported photo-induced absorption at 2.80 eV is attributed to pump-induced lattice heating, while potential-dependent measurements reveal that near-edge bleach features arise from pump-induced band flattening and subsequent surface photovoltage relaxation. Fitting transient absorption spectra with independently measured thermal and electrostatic components enables quantification of both thermal and photovoltage dynamics, while the sub-bandgap response provides insight into the redistribution of defect charge states. Thus, this approach to quantifying thermal, electrostatic, and defect-mediated contributions to microsecond-to-second transient absorption provides broadly applicable insights into photoexcitation and relaxation mechanisms in functional semiconductor photoelectrodes.

AI.tldr: 本文通过结合微秒到秒级瞬态吸收光谱与互补光学光谱技术，系统解析了Ta₃N₅薄膜中晶格加热、静电效应和缺陷态的贡献，提出了量化热动力学、光电压动力学及缺陷电荷态再分布的方法，为半导体光电极的激发与弛豫机制提供了新见解。
AI.motivation: Ta₃N₅作为光阳极材料虽被广泛研究，但其性能受限于短载流子寿命和缺陷介导的复合。瞬态吸收光谱虽常用于探测载流子动力学，但光谱归属常因信号重叠而模糊不清，因此需要一种方法区分不同物理过程的贡献。
AI.method: 结合微秒到秒级瞬态吸收光谱与光反射谱、电位依赖测量等互补光学技术；通过光反射谱识别Ta₃N₅能带结构中的三个临界点；利用热和静电分量独立拟合瞬态吸收光谱，量化热动力学、表面光电压弛豫及亚带隙缺陷态响应。
AI.result: 识别出2.14 eV和2.27 eV的各向异性近边跃迁及2.80 eV的高能跃迁；发现2.80 eV的光致吸收由泵浦诱导晶格加热引起；近边漂白信号源于泵浦诱导能带平坦化及表面光电压弛豫；成功量化了热与光电压动力学，并揭示了缺陷电荷态再分布。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的量化热、静电及缺陷介导贡献的方法具有广泛适用性，可用于解析功能性半导体光电极中光激发与弛豫的复杂机制。

title: Yukawa screening derivation of the bond-valence rule
summary: The bond-valence model is a standard way to estimate bond strengths in crystals, but its exponential dependence on bond length has lacked a derivation from a specific physical interaction. We show that this form emerges as the leading-order limit of screened Coulomb electrostatics and that the fitted bond-valence softness can be interpreted in terms of an electronic screening length. This turns bond valence from an empirical fitting rule into a transferable descriptor of local screened charge response across coordination environments. The resulting theory predicts how the bond-valence parameters should vary with ionic charge and coordination number, and that prediction agrees with 150 fitted valences from 94 cation-oxygen species, including 68 in fourfold coordination and 82 in sixfold coordination, at an abundance-weighted coefficient of determination of 0.986. A comparison with first-principles charge densities shows that the bond-valence shell radius tracks the electronic screening cloud with coefficients of determination of 0.9998 for ten alkali and alkaline-earth oxides and 0.967 for 21 other binary oxides whose nearest-neighbor environments match the theory's assumptions. The widely used bond-valence model is thus the leading-order expression of screened electrostatics in ionic solids.

AI.tldr: 本文证明键价模型是屏蔽库仑静电学的一阶近似，键价参数中的柔软度可解释为电子屏蔽长度，从而将经验性的键价规则转化为可传递的局部屏蔽电荷响应描述符。
AI.motivation: 键价模型虽被广泛使用，但其指数形式的键长-键强关系长期缺乏具体的物理相互作用推导，经验参数的意义不明确。
AI.method: 从屏蔽库仑静电学出发推导键价模型的指数形式，将柔软度参数与电子屏蔽长度建立联系，并通过94种阳离子-氧物种（150个拟合键价）、第一性原理电荷密度比较进行验证。
AI.result: 预测的键价参数与离子电荷和配位数的关系在丰度加权决定系数0.986下与实验数据吻合；键价壳半径与电子屏蔽云的决定系数在碱/碱土氧化物中为0.9998，在21种其他二元氧化物中为0.967。
AI.conclusion: 键价模型本质上是离子固体中屏蔽静电学的"领头阶"表达式，从经验拟合规则提升为有明确物理基础的局部电荷响应理论。

title: From Narrow-gap Semiconductor to Metallic Altermagnet: Optical Fingerprints of Co-Doped FeSb$_2$
summary: The realization of bulk metallic altermagnetism has remained elusive despite the growing number of candidate materials. Here, we present evidence that moderate cobalt substitution ($\sim$15%) drives the correlated narrow-gap semiconductor FeSb$_2$ into a metallic altermagnetic state persisting up to room temperature. The infrared optical conductivity reveals low-energy interband transitions near 0.1 eV that emerge upon doping and grow with Co concentration. Density functional theory calculations show that these transitions originate exclusively from altermagnetic spin ordering, with spin split bands ($\sim$0.2 meV) of non-relativistic origin, together with spin-orbit coupling induced band splitting of the order of $\sim$5 meV near the Fermi level. Co substitution further leads to Fano lineshapes and mode mixing in the infrared-active phonons, reflecting enhanced electron-phonon coupling and local inversion symmetry breaking, while leaving the altermagnetic spin symmetry intact. Our results establish carrier-tuned FeSb$_2$ as a platform for exploring metallic $d$-wave altermagnetism and its coupling to lattice degrees of freedom.

AI.tldr: 通过钴掺杂（约15%），将窄隙半导体FeSb₂转变为室温下持续存在的金属态交变磁性材料，红外光学电导率、DFT计算和声子谱分析证实了d波交变磁性及其与晶格自由度的耦合。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有不少候选材料，但块体金属态交变磁性的实现仍然难以捉摸，本文旨在通过载流子调控在FeSb₂中实现这一目标。
AI.method: 采用钴替代掺杂（约15%），结合红外光学电导率测量、密度泛函理论（DFT）计算以及红外活性声子的Fano线形分析，系统研究了FeSb₂的电子结构和磁性质变化。
AI.result: 1) 钴掺杂驱动FeSb₂进入室温下稳定的金属态交变磁性状态；2) 光学电导率显示约0.1 eV的低能带间跃迁，DFT证实其源自交变磁自旋排序；3) 非相对论起源的自旋分裂能带约0.2 meV，自旋轨道耦合引起的能带分裂约5 meV；4) 声子谱出现Fano线形和模式混合，表明电子-声子耦合增强和局域反演对称性破缺。
AI.conclusion: FeSb₂可作为探索金属态d波交变磁性及其与晶格自由度耦合的平台，为交变磁性材料的研究提供了新途径。

title: Polar Topologies in a Ferroelastic Metal Membrane
summary: Polar metals, materials in which electric polarisation and metallicity coexist, are exceptionally rare because itinerant electrons screen long-range dipoles and favour centrosymmetric structures. Engineering polar textures in a conducting magnet holds promise for reconfigurable spin orbit coupling and magnetoelectric functionality. Here we show that releasing epitaxial SrRuO3 films from their substrates drives a hierarchy of ferroelastic domain refinement from micrometre to nanometre length scales, and that this structural reorganisation spontaneously generates two distinct classes of emergent polar texture that are ubiquitous across the freestanding membrane. Using correlative microscopy from mesoscale electron channelling contrast imaging (ECCI) to atomic resolution scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM), we demonstrate that electric polarisation emerges selectively at translation-inequivalent antiphase boundaries (APBs). At these boundaries multicomponent aac tilt field undergoes Neel-like interpolation that preserves the in-phase tilt component and amplifies roto flexoelectric coupling, while translation-equivalent boundaries remain nonpolar. The Neel like interpolation at hard APBs and Ising like collapse of all tilt components at easy APBs is corroborated with ab initio calculations. While embedded 90 ferroelastic walls provide an additional mechanistically distinct source of electric polarisation resulting in polar nanoclusters (4 nm). These distinct nanotextures at 90 walls from via elastic accommodation of strain mismatch between variants and rotostriction as the tilt field interpolates across the boundaries. These findings show that, in a membrane form, metal oxides provide a robust platform for hosting nanoscale ferroelastic domains that generate polar textures.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了通过将SrRuO₃薄膜从基底释放，在导电铁磁体中诱导出从微米到纳米尺度的铁弹畴细化，并自发产生两种不同的极性织构。利用关联显微镜和第一性原理计算，发现极性出现在反相边界（APBs）和90°铁弹壁处，分别源于Neel型倾斜场插值和弹性应变匹配/旋转伸缩耦合。
AI.motivation: 极性金属中极性与金属性共存极为罕见，而工程化导电磁体中的极性织构有望实现可重构的自旋-轨道耦合和磁电功能。本研究旨在探索通过机械释放外延薄膜来创造这种极性织构的可能性。
AI.method: 释放外延SrRuO₃薄膜使其自由站立，结合介观尺度的电子通道衬比成像（ECCI）和原子分辨率的扫描透射电子显微镜（STEM）进行关联显微分析，并辅以第一性原理计算。
AI.result: 发现了两种极性织构来源：1) 在不等价反相边界处，多组分aac倾斜场发生Neel型插值，增强旋转-挠曲电耦合，产生极性；2) 在90°铁弹壁处，通过变体间的弹性应变匹配和旋转伸缩耦合，形成~4 nm的极性纳米簇。
AI.conclusion: 在金属氧化物膜中，通过铁弹畴的纳米化工程可以稳健地生成极性织构，为极性金属的设计和功能化提供了新平台。

title: Unveiling the potential of NdPO4 magnetocaloric phases in cryogenic refrigeration
comment: Paper presented at Intermag2026, Manchester, UK
summary: The RPO4 orthophosphates (R = rare earth element) have recently attracted a wide interest due to the strong coupling between their electronic, orbital and structural ordering parameters resulting in a variety of functional properties. Herein, we demonstrate that NdPO4 phases synthesized via a facile precipitation growth process unveil promise in low-temperature magnetic cooling. The analysis of their structural properties reveals nanorod forms with diameters of 10 to 20 nm and lengths ranging from 200 to 500 nm while the heat treatment transforms their hexagonal rhabdophane-type structure to a monoclinic anhydrous monazite-type symmetry. Magnetization measurements and DFT calculations show strong antiferromagnetic couplings and the absence of any magnetic ordering in the 2-300 K range. On the other hand, the monoclinic phase of NdPO4 exhibits a large magnetocaloric effect of about 19 J/kg K under 5 T near 3 K, outperforming some reference materials containing more expensive rare-earth elements with high magnetic moments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过简便沉淀法合成的NdPO4纳米棒，发现其单斜相在低温下具有优异磁热效应（~19 J/kg K，5 T，3 K），性能优于某些含高磁矩稀土元素的参考材料，在低温磁制冷领域具有应用潜力。
AI.motivation: RPO4正磷酸盐因电子、轨道和结构序参量间的强耦合而具有多种功能特性，但NdPO4在低温磁冷却方面的潜力尚待探索。
AI.method: 采用简便沉淀生长法合成NdPO4，通过热处理实现六方磷铈矿相到单斜独居石相转变；结合磁化测量与DFT计算分析磁性能。
AI.result: 合成的NdPO4呈纳米棒形态（直径10-20 nm，长度200-500 nm）；单斜相在3 K、5 T条件下磁热效应达~19 J/kg K，性能优于某些含高价稀土元素的参考材料。
AI.conclusion: NdPO4单斜相在低温磁制冷领域具有良好应用前景，且合成方法简便、成本相对较低。

title: Multi-scale calculation of light-induced structural changes in low-angle twisted bilayer WSe$_2$
summary: Exciton-phonon interactions in transition metal dichalcogenides (TMD) are strong and lead to phenomena such as coherent phonon generation. When stacked and twisted, their properties can be tuned by the twisting angle. In experiments with 1.1$^\circ$ twisted 2L WSe$_2$, a change of 0.1 Å in the interlayer distance was observed when light was shone on this material, and here we explain the microscopic mechanism behind this. Theoretical works to study such systems are limited because the Moiré unit cell is too large. To overcome this, we combined classical force field relaxations with our implementation of ab initio GW/Bethe-Salpeter excited state forces (ESF). From the relaxations we found that the low-angle twisting induced an in-plane strain field, the AB regions are large enough to be simulated as periodic AB stacked 2L WSe2, and the interlayer force constant becomes softer in relation to the perfect AB stacking. From the ab initio ESF we obtained that the in-plane strain increases the out of plane ESFs. Those two effects combined, the weakening of the interlayer force constant and strain dependence of the ESF, make light-induced changes in the interlayer distance of twisted 2L WSe2 stronger than in the perfectly stacked case, in agreement with experimental observations. Therefore, our results show that the exciton-phonon interactions can be tuned in twisted 2L TMDs and can be observed experimentally, which makes those materials excellent platforms to study light-induced changes in materials.

AI.tldr: 该论文通过结合经典力场弛豫和第一性原理GW/Bethe-Salpeter激发态力计算，解释了1.1°扭转双层WSe₂在光照下层间距变化0.1 Å的微观机制：扭转导致的平面内应变使层间力常数变软，同时应变增强了面外激发态力，两者协同效应使光致层间距变化强于完美堆叠情况，揭示了扭转TMD中激子-声子相互作用的可调性。
AI.motivation: 实验发现1.1°扭转双层WSe₂在光照下层间距发生0.1 Å变化，但其微观机制尚不明确。由于Moiré超胞过大，传统理论方法难以研究此类系统，需要发展新方法解释这一现象。
AI.method: 结合经典力场弛豫与第一性原理GW/Bethe-Salpeter激发态力（ESF）计算。经典弛豫处理大尺度Moiré结构，发现低角扭转诱导平面内应变场，AB区域可模拟为周期性AB堆叠，且层间力常数变软；第一性原理计算揭示平面内应变增强面外激发态力。
AI.result: 层间力常数变软与应变依赖的ESF两个效应共同作用，使扭转双层WSe₂的光致层间距变化比完美堆叠情况更强，与实验观测一致。
AI.conclusion: 扭转双层TMD中激子-声子相互作用可被调控并实验观测，使其成为研究光致材料变化的优秀平台。

title: Strong coupling between quantized magnon modes in a YIG microstucture and microwaves in a superconducting resonator
summary: Strong-coupling experiments based on magnons enable the exploration into on-chip demonstrations involving numerous long-lived excitations. Yttrium iron garnet (YIG) has been considered for decades as a gold standard material for magnonics due to its low-loss magnonic properties. While YIG has successfully demonstrated strong-coupling in macroscopic device geometries, the strong coupling of magnons in truly sub-10 micron YIG structures to date has not yet been realized. This obstacle is due to the difficulty producing large enough effective magnonic mode volume necessary primarily due to thickness limitations of YIG deposition and device fabrication techniques. Here, we demonstrate the use of a microplatelet of YIG, manufactured from a single crystal of YIG via focused ion beam (FIB) techniques, placed on a constricted inductive line of an optimized superconducting lumped element LC resonator to achieve strong coupling between numerous magnon modes and the LC resonator photons. These experimental findings are qualitatively backed by micromagnetic simulations and quantitatively supported by analytical calculations to identify the magnon modes corresponding to the experimentally observed anti-crossings in the microwave transmission signal. Further, we show that these anti-crossings remain even at incredibly low device input powers ($\leq 10$ fW). The fabrication techniques and device geometry enable the deterministic use of numerous confined magnon modes in micron-scale YIG structures for various magnetic field strengths and orientations at substantially reduced device powers. The results here establish a foundational path forward to achieving efficient magnon-based strong-coupling experiments in micron-scale YIG magnetic elements for effective on-chip studies.

AI.tldr: 本文通过聚焦离子束（FIB）技术制备YIG微片，并结合超导LC谐振器，在亚10微米YIG结构中首次实现了强耦合，通过实验、微磁模拟和分析计算验证了多个磁子模式的反交叉现象，为芯片级磁子强耦合研究奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: YIG是磁子学中的黄金标准材料，但在真正亚10微米尺度的YIG结构中尚未实现强耦合，主要受限于YIG沉积厚度和器件制备技术难以获得足够大的有效磁子模式体积。
AI.method: 采用FIB技术从YIG单晶制备微片，将其放置在超导集总元件LC谐振器的收缩感应线上，实现多个磁子模式与LC谐振器光子之间的强耦合；结合微磁学模拟（定性）和解析计算（定量）识别实验观测到的微波传输信号中的反交叉。
AI.result: 成功在亚10微米YIG结构中实现强耦合，观察到多个磁子模式的反交叉现象，且该现象在极低输入功率（≤10 fW）下仍能保持。
AI.conclusion: 本文的制备技术和器件几何结构使得在微米级YIG磁体中确定性地利用多个受限磁子模式成为可能，为芯片级高效磁子强耦合实验提供了基础路径。
